---
title: "Georgia"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
  # dev = "ragg_png"
)

# load packages
library(shiny)
library(highcharter)
library(dplyr)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(dplyr)
library(htmltools)
library(reactable)

# load data
source("prep/00_library.R")
source("prep/01_functions.R")
source("prep/dataframes.R")
```

<br>
<div class="narrow-section">

```{r}
# donuts
chart1 <- 
  all_donut_currently_eligible$Georgia %>% 
  hc_chart(width = 250, height = 200) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Currently Eligible<br>for Parole") 

chart2 <- 
  all_donut_future_eligible$Georgia %>% 
  hc_chart(width = 250, height = 200) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Eligible for Parole<br>in the Future") 

chart3 <- 
  all_donut_future_eligible$Georgia %>% 
  hc_chart(width = 250, height = 200) %>%
  hc_title(text = "TBD<br>Finding") 

# # combine charts into a single row
# htmltools::tagList(
#   htmltools::div(
#     style = "display: flex; 
#     flex-direction: row; 
#     justify-content: space-between; 
#     align-items: center;",
#     class = "highchart-wrapper",
#     chart1,
#     chart2,
#     chart3
#   )
# )
# Add charts to an HTML div
htmltools::div(
  style = "display:flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center;",
  chart1,
  chart2,
  chart3
)
```

</div><br>

```{r}
# save charts to call in tabsetPanel in next R chunk

###########
# Overview
###########

# line chart showing the change in prison pop 
# and the change in releases to parole over time
state_line_pop_released_to_parole <- 
  all_line_pop_released_to_parole$Georgia %>% 
  hc_chart(width = 400, height = 400) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Prison Populations and the Number of 
           People Released to Parole by Reporting Year") 


df <- people_released_to_parole_race %>% 
  filter(state == "Georgia") %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(race, prop)

state_parole_profile_race <- 
    reactable(df,
              style = hc_reactable_style,
              theme = hc_reactable_theme,
              defaultColDef = colDef(format = colFormat(separators = TRUE),
                                     align = "left"),
              compact = TRUE,
              fullWidth = FALSE,
              columns = list(
                race = colDef(name = "Race",
                              minWidth = 215),
                prop = colDef(align = "right",
                              name = "",
                              minWidth = 215,
                              format = colFormat(percent = TRUE,
                                                 digits = 1))))


###########
# Parole Eligibility
###########



###########
# Releases from Prison
###########



###########
# Sentencing
###########



###########
# Disparities
###########
```


```{r}
# panels for different sections
tabsetPanel(
  id = "tabsetpanel",
  tabPanel("Overview",
    state_line_pop_released_to_parole,
  ),
  tabPanel("Parole Eligibility",
    state_parole_profile_race
  ),
  tabPanel("Releases from Prison",
    "TBD."
  ),
  tabPanel("Sentencing",
    "TBD."
  ),
  tabPanel("Disparities",
    "TBD."
  ),
)
```
